name: doot-doot-revolution
description: Browser rhythm game in the DDR and StepMania tradition, built as a workspace of small libraries.
author: Moheeb Zara
comment: Rollup ships its native binary as a per-platform optional dep, but npm omits the ones not matching the machine that generated the lockfile (npm/cli#4828), which breaks `npm ci` on the other OS runners. Declaring all of them here forces every platform's binary into the lockfile so `npm ci` resolves correctly everywhere. Keep the versions in lockstep with rollup.
